parameters.query:
SELECT 
    account_id,
    contact_name,
    linkedin_url,
    phone,
    amount_due,
    due_date,
    status,
    call_id
FROM public.ar_contacts
WHERE status = 'pending'
  AND due_date < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY due_date ASC;

INSERT INTO run_log (run_id, account_id, stage, result, reason)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.run_id }}', 
  '{{ $json.account_id }}', 
  'validation', 
  'skipped', 
  'Missing required phone number field for automation'
);

INSERT INTO run_log (run_id, account_id, stage, result, reason)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.run_id }}', 
  '{{ $json.account_id }}', 
  'Duplicate', 
  'skipped', 
  'Duplicate entity matching an identical record already processed in this batch'
);

INSERT INTO run_log (run_id, account_id, stage, result, reason)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.run_id }}', 
  '{{ $json.account_id }}', 
  'execution', 
  'success', 
  'Pipeline completed successfully: record routed and logged'
);

INSERT INTO clean_output (
  run_id, 
  account_id, 
  contact_name, 
  linkedin_url_normalized, 
  phone, 
  amount_due, 
  due_date, 
  call_status, 
  call_summary
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.run_id }}', 
  '{{ $json.account_id }}', 
  '{{ $json.contact_name }}', 
  '{{ $json.linkedin_url_normalized }}', 
  '{{ $json.phone }}', 
  {{ $json.amount_due }}, 
  '{{ $json.due_date }}', 
  '{{ $json.call_status }}', 
  '{{ $json.call_summary.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
);

json.transcript:
User: Hello. 
Agent: Hi, is this Asha Mehta? This is an automated virtual assistant calling about your overdue invoice for 15,000.00 that was due on May 20, 2026. When do you think you’ll be able to make that payment?
User: Yes. This is Samita. I think I will be able to make the payment in two batches. One eight thousand and one seven thousand by over next week. 
Agent: Okay, thanks for letting me know. Just to confirm, you’re planning to pay 8,000 first and then 7,000, both within next week, correct?
User: Yes 
Agent: Thanks for confirming, Samita. I’ve noted that you’ll pay 8,000 and then 7,000 over next week toward the overdue invoice of 15,000 that was due on May 20, 2026. If anything changes, please contact our billing team. Have a good day.

Thanks for confirming, Samita. I’ve noted that you’ll pay 8,000 and then 7,000 over next week toward the overdue invoice of 15,000 that was due on May 20, 2026. If anything changes, please contact our billing team. Have a good day.

call_analysis.call_summary: The agent contacted Samita regarding an overdue invoice of $15,000. Samita confirmed she will pay the amount in two batches—$8,000 and $7,000—over the next week. The agent acknowledged the payment plan and ended the call.
